title: minecolonies extra
description: A minecolonies modpack for those how want to build a thriving colony inside the world of minecraft with some extra mods to help you in building your civilisation
body:
This mod pack allows you to bring your colony building skills to minecraft where ever you want with some mods that aim to make your life easier as you expand and build bigger and newer buildings with many styles to chose from to that you think best suits your location and your liking.

suggestions will be appreciated and taken into consideration, i will also try my best to add new content to help or make the game slighty more like an adventure too

thank you for downloading this pack or even just look at it feel free to share the pack to everyone
